case_title: HERRICK, GAIL VS YEN, ANN Q. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY HERRICK, GAIL AS TO DEFENDANT YEN, ANN Q. SAN BRUNO SUPERMARKET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
MAILED TO SC, TO MAIL BACK.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERRICK, GAIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YEN, ANN Q. SAN BRUNO SUPERMARKET $160.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $200.00, WONG WAIVED SERVICE FOR SAN BRUNO SUPERMARKET STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $353.50 AS TO DEFENDANT YEN, ANN Q. SAN BRUNO SUPERMARKET
